metadata.description: Agent Skills for dependency security including vulnerability scanning, package review, patching, setup and configuration, and secure dependency updates via Socket.dev

plugins.name: scan
plugins.description: Scan all packages and dependencies within a repository for vulnerabilities, malware, and supply-chain risks. Covers full project scans across ecosystems (npm, PyPI, Go, Maven, etc.), output interpretation, and CI integration.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Research a package before you depend on it — pull every signal from Socket (scores, alerts, malware verdicts, CVEs, supply-chain risk), check the socket.dev package page, evaluate alternatives, and surface available Socket patches.

plugins.name: patch
plugins.description: Patch one or more security vulnerabilities and set up patching infrastructure within a repository. Find safe upgrade paths, apply fixes, and configure automated patching workflows.

plugins.name: setup
plugins.description: Set up Socket from scratch — install the CLI, authenticate with `socket login`, optionally install the GitHub App, and configure Socket Firewall (free or enterprise).

plugins.name: update
plugins.description: Use socket fix to find and update vulnerable dependencies, then fix any breaking changes in the codebase. Security-audited upgrades with automated code migration.
